  • Examples

Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) API (gxcr/aead.h)
[gxcr User-Level Crypto Acceleration API]

Detailed Description

The gxcr_aead_ API, declared in gxcr/aead.h, provides a basic framework for AEAD processing with the MiCA Packet Processing engine.

It allows the user to set up a data structure based on the parameters in gxcr_aead_params_t. However, the actual packet processing requires the programming of a custom "token" for the engine. The token is a series of instructions, some of which have fields that vary on a per-context basis, some of which vary on a per-packet basis. This custom layer is in tokens/aead.h.

The Packet Processing engine is a very flexible, programmable engine which is capable of many types of IPsec, SSL, and other packet processing. Please read the IO Device Guide (UG404) Appendix D for more information on the programming of the Packet Processing engine.


Data Structures

struct  gxcr_aead_params_t
 Parameters used to set up an AEAD context. More...
struct  gxcr_aead_context_t
 Data structure that encapsulates a pointer to the memory that is to be used with the shim for the metadata, and the information about where the token and the context record fields are within that memory. More...

Modules

 Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) (gxcr/tokens/aead.h)
 The AEAD token processes AEAD requests.

Functions

void * gxcr_aead_context_key (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns a pointer to the cipher key data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.
int gxcr_aead_context_key_len (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns the cipher key length for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.
void * gxcr_aead_context_iv (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns a pointer to the initialization vector data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.
int gxcr_aead_context_iv_len (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns the length of the initialization vector for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.
void * gxcr_aead_context_digest0 (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns a pointer to the first field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.
int gxcr_aead_context_digest0_len (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns the length of the first field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.
void * gxcr_aead_context_digest1 (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns a pointer to the second field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.
int gxcr_aead_context_digest1_len (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns the length of the second field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.
gxcr_result_token_t * gxcr_aead_result (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context)
 Returns a pointer to the result token associated with this AEAD context.
size_t gxcr_aead_calc_context_bytes (gxcr_aead_params_t *aead_params)
 Function to find out how much memory to allocate for a particular aead_context.
int gxcr_aead_init_context (gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context, void *metadata_mem, int metadata_mem_len, gxcr_aead_params_t *aead_params, unsigned char *key, unsigned char *iv)
 Function to initialize an aead_context with cipher/digest algorithms.
size_t gxcr_aead_precalc_calc_memory_size (gxcr_aead_params_t *aead_params, int key_len)
 Function to find out how much MiCA-registered memory to allocate for use by gxcr_aead_precalc() for the purpose of performing the precalculation step needed when using HMAC or XCBC digests.
int gxcr_aead_precalc (gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, gxcr_aead_context_t *aead_context, void *scratch_mem, int scratch_mem_len, void *digest_key, int digest_key_len)
 This function uses the MiCA accelerator to perform further initialization of the gxcr_aead_context_t data structure, when either an HMAC or XCBC digest is used.

Function Documentation

void* gxcr_aead_context_key ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns a pointer to the cipher key data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

int gxcr_aead_context_key_len ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns the cipher key length for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

void* gxcr_aead_context_iv ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns a pointer to the initialization vector data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

int gxcr_aead_context_iv_len ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns the length of the initialization vector for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a cipher.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

void* gxcr_aead_context_digest0 ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns a pointer to the first field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

int gxcr_aead_context_digest0_len ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns the length of the first field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

void* gxcr_aead_context_digest1 ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns a pointer to the second field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, NULL if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

int gxcr_aead_context_digest1_len ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns the length of the second field of precalculated digest data for a gxcr_aead_context_t, 0 if this gxcr_aead_context_t doesn't do a hash.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

gxcr_result_token_t* gxcr_aead_result ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context  ) 

Returns a pointer to the result token associated with this AEAD context.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the AEAD context.

size_t gxcr_aead_calc_context_bytes ( gxcr_aead_params_t *  aead_params  ) 

Function to find out how much memory to allocate for a particular aead_context.

Parameters:
aead_params Parameters for the definition of the AEAD context.

int gxcr_aead_init_context ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context,
void *  metadata_mem,
int  metadata_mem_len,
gxcr_aead_params_t *  aead_params,
unsigned char *  key,
unsigned char *  iv 
)

Function to initialize an aead_context with cipher/digest algorithms.

This sets up the metadata memory with the token and the context record, and sets up internal data structures with information on the sizes and offsets of fields in the context record so they can be accessed via accessor functions.

Parameters:
aead_context Pointer to the context that will be initialized.
metadata_mem Points to memory for metadata to be used with shim. This memory must be registered with the shim.
metadata_mem_len Length, in bytes, of metadata memory. The function gxcr_aead_calc_context_bytes() can be used to determine the amount of memory needed.
aead_params Specifies cipher, digest, and other params pertaining to AEAD operation to perform on packet.
key Pointer to memory containing initial value for the key. Length is determined by the algorithms selected in the params.
iv Pointer to memory containing initial value for IV. Length is determined by the algorithms selected in the params.

size_t gxcr_aead_precalc_calc_memory_size ( gxcr_aead_params_t *  aead_params,
int  key_len 
)

Function to find out how much MiCA-registered memory to allocate for use by gxcr_aead_precalc() for the purpose of performing the precalculation step needed when using HMAC or XCBC digests.

Parameters:
aead_params Parameters for the definition of the AEAD context.
key_len Length of the digest key for this algorithm.

int gxcr_aead_precalc ( gxio_mica_context_t *  mica_context,
gxcr_aead_context_t *  aead_context,
void *  scratch_mem,
int  scratch_mem_len,
void *  digest_key,
int  digest_key_len 
)

This function uses the MiCA accelerator to perform further initialization of the gxcr_aead_context_t data structure, when either an HMAC or XCBC digest is used.

This function must be run before the gxcr_aead_context_t is used for a packet operation if one of these digest types is used. It must not be run if a regular digest will not be used.

Parameters:
mica_context An initalized MiCA context.
aead_context Pointer to an SA that has been initialized via gxcr_aead_init_context().
scratch_mem Pointer to scratch memory to be used by the shim. Memory must be 32-bit aligned and registed with the MiCA shim via gxio_mica_register_page(). The function gxcr_aead_precalc_calc_memory_size() tells how much MiCA-registered memory must be provided to this function. The memory may be freed after this function returns.
scratch_mem_len Length of provided precalc metadata memory, in bytes.
digest_key Pointer to the digest key.
digest_key_len The length, in bytes, of the digest key.
